attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  ST.TRANSACTION_ID ,
  ST.APPLICATION_NAME ,
  ST.APPLICATION_ID ,
  ST.LEDGER_ID      ,
  ST.ORG_ID         ,
  ST.TRX_CLASS  ,
  ST.ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
  ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
  ST.TRX_NUMBER    ,
  ST.TRX_DATE       ,
  ST.TRX_LINE_ID    ,
  ST.TRX_LINE_NUM   ,
  ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
  ST.AMOUNT,
  ST.ORDER_QUANTITY,
  ST.CURRENCY_CODE,
  ST.PROCESS_STATUS,
  ST.ELEMENT_TYPE   ,
  ST.RULE_START_DATE,
  ST.RULE_END_DATE  ,
  ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION ,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE1 ,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE2 ,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE3 ,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE4 ,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE5 ,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE6 ,
  ST.SKU,
  ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,          
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
  USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME   , 
  USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER    ,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE11,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE12,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE13,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE27,
  ST.ATTRIBUTE30
   FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_RMA  ST
   WHERE  NOT EXISTS (
   SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_RMA  EL
   WHERE 
   EL.TRANSACTION_ID= ST.TRANSACTION_ID      
   AND EL.APPLICATION_ID = ST.APPLICATION_ID)
